failures.name: LexicalUtils tests > isMoveToEnd() / isMoveToStart() accept Shift modifier
MOVE_TO_START on a leading inline DecoratorNode (Issue #8555) > Cmd+ArrowLeft from text caret moves caret before the inline decorator
MOVE_TO_START on a leading inline DecoratorNode (Issue #8555) > Shift+Cmd+ArrowLeft selects from text caret back to element start
MOVE_TO_START on a leading inline DecoratorNode (Issue #8555) > Same fix applies inside HeadingNode
